title: Hermes Agent Desktop + FREE APIs: This is ACTUALLY ONE OF THE BEST AGENT APPS!
summary: Hermes Agent Desktop is a desktop app that provides a visual interface for the Hermes Agent framework, featuring session management, skill toggling, multi-platform messaging integrations, scheduled task execution via cron, subagent orchestration, and multi-model provider support. The app consolidates agent capabilities that were previously terminal-based into a unified graphical interface.
